fun solve(grid: Array<Array<Long>>, k: Long): Long {
    val m = grid.size
    val n = grid[0].size
    val teleportList = Array(m) { Array(n) { mutableListOf<IntArray>() } }

    for (i in 0 until m) {
        for (j in 0 until n) {
            val currentVal = grid[i][j]
            for (x in 0 until m) {
                for (y in 0 until n) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= currentVal) {
                        teleportList[i][j].add(intArrayOf(x, y))
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    val dist = Array(m) { Array(n) { Array(k.toInt() + 1) { Long.MAX_VALUE } } }
    dist[0][0][0] = 0L

    val pq = PriorityQueue(compareBy { it.cost })

    pq.add(State(0L, 0, 0, 0))

    while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
        val state = pq.poll()
        val cost = state.cost
        val i = state.i
        val j = state.j
        val t = state.t

        if (i == m - 1 && j == n - 1) {
            return cost
        }

        if (cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue
        }

        // Regular moves
        if (j + 1 < n) {
            val newCost = cost + grid[i][j + 1]
            if (newCost < dist[i][j + 1][t]) {
                dist[i][j + 1][t] = newCost
                pq.add(State(newCost, i, j + 1, t))
            }
        }
        if (i + 1 < m) {
            val newCost = cost + grid[i + 1][j]
            if (newCost < dist[i + 1][j][t]) {
                dist[i + 1][j][t] = newCost
                pq.add(State(newCost, i + 1, j, t))
            }
        }

        // Teleportation
        if (t < k) {
            for (tele in teleportList[i][j]) {
                val x = tele[0]
                val y = tele[1]
                val newT = t + 1
                if (cost < dist[x][y][newT]) {
                    dist[x][y][newT] = cost
                    pq.add(State(cost, x, y, newT))
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return -1L
}
